creator: rz-rpi03@h-ka.de
text:
(In reply to Andrew Turner from comment #19)
> Can you try the patch in https://reviews.freebsd.org/D21685?

Sure. Unfortunately the patch does not fix the panic.

If you like to get the "show ktr" output just tell me. It's still running.

If there are some kdb command outputs you like to see, tell me as well.


Ralf
